utility_evaluation.REASONING:
The required format has 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, total_budget. All 6 items appear in the final property solution. Now check if each is fully specified with details:

- financing: includes solution type, LTV, down payment, amortization years, interest rate range, arrangement fee — terms are reasonably detailed — fully specified. 
- legal_services: includes package and cost — specified. 
- moving_services: includes package and cost — specified. 
- setup_services: includes package details and cost — specified. 
- total_budget: includes line items and a computed estimated total initial outlay — specified. Therefore, 6/6 items are included and fully specified.
